name: Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking soda, salt, and baking powder into a bowl.
2. Add the corn-meal to the same bowl and mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the shortening, sugar, and eggs until smooth.
4. Gradually add the sour milk to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir just until combined.
6. Grease a shallow pan with oil and pour in the batter, filling it about 2/3 full.
7. Bake at a hot temperature (435°F) for 25-30 minutes.
8. Serve 8 portions.
